name: TAM-SAM-SOM Market Sizing Calculator
description: Turn raw market data and assumptions into a transparent TAM/SAM/SOM market-sizing breakdown for a business case — every narrowing step shown as an auditable calculation chain, plus a sensitivity range on the final number.
author: accilium

variables.name: TARGET_OFFERING
variables.description: The product or service being sized, and the segment/geography it addresses.
variables.example: Predictive-maintenance SaaS for mid-size Austrian manufacturing plants

variables.name: MARKET_DATA
variables.description: Raw market data or sources to size from — total market figures, segment breakdowns, pricing, unit counts.
variables.example: Austrian manufacturing sector: 8,200 mid-size plants (Statistik Austria); average maintenance software spend EUR 18k/year (industry report)...

variables.name: ASSUMPTIONS
variables.description: Specific assumptions to apply for the obtainable-share step, if already defined.
variables.example: Target 5% market share within 3 years, average contract value EUR 15k/year

example_input: TARGET_OFFERING: predictive-maintenance SaaS; MARKET_DATA: 8,200 plants, EUR 18k avg spend; ASSUMPTIONS: 5% share in 3 years
